name: Voice of Distortion

rulesText.description: One creature that can hear Capella makes a DC 25 WIS save. On failure choose one: lose reaction, disadvantage on next attack, cannot willingly move closer, or subtract 1d6 from next saving throw or ability check.

desc: One creature that can hear Capella makes a DC 25 WIS save. On failure choose one: lose reaction, disadvantage on next attack, cannot willingly move closer, or subtract 1d6 from next saving throw or ability check.
